full_text:
He Yan (Pingshu) 何晏 (平叔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Yan (何晏), styledPingshu (平叔). Was a trusted friend of Cao Shuang, a leading writer and philosopher. Took drugs. He Yan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. He Yan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
